title: Library Working Days and Hours
content: The University Library operates daily from 7:00 AM until 5:00 AM the following morning on regular working days. It remains closed on Republic Day, Holi, Diwali, Independence Day, and Guru Nanak Dev Ji’s Birthday. On Dussehra, the library closes at 2:30 PM, and on Lohri, it closes at 5:00 PM.

title: Search Books in Library Collection
content: To search for specific books available in the University Library, please use the Web OPAC (Online Public Access Catalogue). You can search by title, author, subject, or keyword to check book availability in the library collection.

title: Library Contact Details
content: For official communication, please visit the Contact Us page where the official phone numbers and email details of the University Library are provided.

title: Search Books in Library
content: To search for specific books available in the library collection, please use the Online Public Access Catalogue (OPAC).

title: Free eBooks
content: The library provides access to free and subscribed eBook platforms such as Project Gutenberg, Open Library, ManyBooks, Feedbooks and other academic resources. You can explore them on the eBooks page.

title: eJournal Access
content: The library provides access to national and international peer-reviewed eJournals across economics, mathematics, science, humanities, and interdisciplinary research. You can explore them on the eJournals page.

title: Search Subject Books in Library
content: To find books on a specific subject available in the University Library, please use the Web OPAC (Online Public Access Catalogue). You can search by subject, title, or author to check book availability in the library collection.

title: Library Services & Facilities
content: The University Library provides circulation services, reference assistance, reading facilities, digital access, research support, and specialized academic services for students, faculty members, and research scholars. For detailed information, please visit the Services page.

title: Library Tour & Orientation
content: New users can explore the Library Tour and Orientation page to understand different sections, facilities, services, and academic resources available in the library.

title: Latest Notices
content: For the latest official announcements and updates, please visit the Notices page.

title: Library Events & Gallery
content: The Gallery page showcases events, activities, seminars, workshops, and important occasions held in the University Library.

title: Dr. Ganda Singh Punjabi Reference Library
content: Dr. Ganda Singh Punjabi Reference Library specializes in Punjab History, Punjabi Literature, Sikh Studies, and rare historical collections including manuscripts, newspapers, and archival materials. For detailed information, please visit its dedicated page.
